languages.text: {n}Эоганн гулко хмыкает, преисполненный досады.{/n} "Прискорбное обстоятельство. {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Дух машины{/g} подъемника, находится в глубокой гибернации — благодать Движущей Силы оставила его. Без него нам не пересечь расщелину".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн гулко хмыкает, преисполненный досады.{/n} "Прискорбное обстоятельство. {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Дух машины{/g} подъемника, находится в глубокой гибернации — благодать Движущей Силы оставила его. Без него нам не пересечь расщелину".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн гулко хмыкает, преисполненный досады.{/n} "Прискорбное обстоятельство. {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Дух машины{/g} подъемника, находится в глубокой гибернации — благодать Движущей Силы оставила его. Без него нам не пересечь расщелину".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a low, resonant grunt, filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} lies in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force has abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

{n}Eogunn lets out a low, resonant grunt, filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} lies in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force has abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

{n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

{n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein tiefes, frustriertes Knurren aus.{/n} "Eine bedauerliche Situation. Der {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} des Aufzugs ist ihn tiefen Schlaf versunken, als ihn die Antriebskraft verließ. Ohne ihn sitzen wir auf dieser Seite fest."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein tiefes, frustriertes Knurren aus.{/n} "Eine bedauerliche Situation. Der {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} des Aufzugs ist ihn tiefen Schlaf versunken, als ihn die Antriebskraft verließ. Ohne ihn sitzen wir auf dieser Seite fest."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un grognement sourd de frustration.{/n} « La situation est déplorable. L'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} de cet ascenseur est entré en hibernation depuis que la Force Motrice l'a abandonné. Sans lui, nous sommes coincés de ce côté du gouffre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un grognement sourd de frustration.{/n} « La situation est déplorable. L'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} de cet ascenseur est entré en hibernation depuis que la Force Motrice l'a abandonné. Sans lui, nous sommes coincés de ce côté du gouffre. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡发出了一声低沉而带有共振的闷哼，满是沮丧。{/n}“情况很不妙。自从失去源力的恩典，电梯的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}便陷入了深眠。没有它，我们只能被困在裂隙的这一侧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡发出了一声低沉而带有共振的闷哼，满是沮丧。{/n}“情况很不妙。自从失去源力的恩典，电梯的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}便陷入了深眠。没有它，我们只能被困在裂隙的这一侧。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn emite un sonoro gruñido de frustración.{/n} «Es una situación lamentable. El {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del ascensor lleva hibernando profundamente desde que la gracia de la Fuerza Motriz lo abandonó. Sin él, no podremos cruzar este abismo».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn emite un sonoro gruñido de frustración.{/n} «Es una situación lamentable. El {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del ascensor lleva hibernando profundamente desde que la gracia de la Fuerza Motriz lo abandonó. Sin él, no podremos cruzar este abismo».

languages.text: {n}エオガンは苛立ちに満ちた低く響くようなうめき声を上げる。{/n}「嘆かわしい状況だ。リフトの{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械霊{/g} 、原動力の恩寵がそれを見捨てて以来、深い冬眠状態にある。我々はそれなしで裂け目のこちら側に取り残されている」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは苛立ちに満ちた低く響くようなうめき声を上げる。{/n}「嘆かわしい状況だ。リフトの{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械霊{/g} 、原動力の恩寵がそれを見捨てて以来、深い冬眠状態にある。我々はそれなしで裂け目のこちら側に取り残されている」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, hayal kırıklığıyla dolu pes bir homurtu çıkarıyor.{/n} "İçler acısı bir durum. Asansörün {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhu{/g}, Devinim Gücü'nün lütfu onu terk ettiğinden beri derin uykuda. O olmadan yarığın bu tarafında mahsuruz."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."
